releaseNotes: Small safe updater test release to verify that Inventra can detect, prepare, restart, and install a newer version.
No functional app changes are included except version/update metadata refresh and safer automatic release JSON generation after installer build.
Keeps GitHub Releases as the update host for now while preserving future Cloudflare R2, Bunny, S3, Supabase Pro, or custom CDN support.
Keeps parallel byte-range download, streaming fallback, SHA-256 verification support, cached metadata, and the reliable restart-to-update guard.
No app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase data, backup data, branding, or icon assets are deleted.
